message:
fix: accept sessions directory as valid root in Pi-Agent scan_roots path

The `looks_like_root` check in PiAgentConnector::scan() rejected the
sessions directory itself (e.g. ~/.pi/agent/sessions) when passed via
scan_roots/watch mode, because it only checked for a child "sessions"
subdir or a filename containing "pi". Detection returns the sessions
directory as the root_path, so the watch callback and scan_roots code
path would silently skip all Pi-Agent sessions in nested subdirectories.

Now also accepts paths named "sessions" or containing ".pi/agent" in
the path string, matching the is_pi_agent_dir heuristic used elsewhere.

Adds a regression test that simulates the watch/scan_roots code path
with nested project-scoped subdirectories.

Closes Dicklesworthstone/coding_agent_session_search#85

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
